text: Audit current SVG rendering implementation and identify bottlenecks

status.comment: Completed comprehensive audit in SVG_RENDERING_AUDIT.md. Identified 7 major bottlenecks: Vue component overhead (HIGH), computed recalculation (MED-HIGH), SVG path generation (MED), text rendering (MED), no viewport culling (HIGH), CSS transitions (LOW-MED), label visibility (LOW). Estimated performance: ~8fps at 1000 nodes. Recommends viewport culling as Priority 1 quick win before WebGL migration.
